updates.content:
Title: We're looking into a potential problem impacting Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

User impact: We're checking for potential impact to your users.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Copilot Chat and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: We're looking into a potential problem impacting Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat

User impact: We're checking for potential impact to your users.

Final status: We've determined that this issue is a duplicate of another event. Please look for further updates in CW1386443. This communication will expire in 24 hours.

This is the final update for the event.
